description.description: Detailed explanation of the notification channel's purpose and functionality

enabled.description: Indicates if the notification channel is actively sending alerts

force_delete.description: Specifies whether the channel can be deleted regardless of dependencies

id.description: Unique identifier for the notification channel within Google Cloud

name.description: Human-readable name assigned to the notification channel

sensitive_labels.description: Key-value pairs containing sensitive configuration details

verification_status.description: Current verification status of the notification channel
